eas_text: An EAS participant has issued A PRACTICE/DEMO WARNING for the following counties or areas: Apache; Navajo; Coconino, AZ; San Juan, UT; Bernalillo; Cibola; McKinley; Sandoval; San Juan; Socorro; Rio Arriba, NM; at 05:02 PM ON MAY 23, 2026 Effective until 05:17 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is a test of the WSLF Radio CAP internet archive system. This is only a test. We are making sure everything is working properly to ensure reliability of this service.
